title: Attention-Based Spatial-Temporal Graph Neural Network With Long-Term Dependencies for Traffic Speed Prediction
notes: Long-term attention STGNN adapter with causal gated temporal blocks, RMSNorm attention, directed line-graph mixing, and auto Huber loss.

title: ICST-DNET: An Interpretable Causal Spatio-Temporal Diffusion Network for Traffic Speed Prediction
notes: Causal spatio-temporal diffusion adapter with fixed line-graph diffusion, learned causal graph generation, and time-pattern gating.

title: How to Accurately Forecast Highway Traffic Speed? A Self-Supervised Spatio-Temporal Bilateral Learning Network
notes: Self-supervised bilateral learner adapter with bidirectional recurrent encoding, directed line-graph mixing, and history reconstruction auxiliary loss.

title: Multi-View Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network for Traffic Prediction
notes: Multi-view STGCN adapter with forward line graph, reverse line graph, and learned adaptive graph views.

title: Contextualizing MLP-Mixers Spatiotemporally for Urban Traffic Data Forecast at Scale
notes: Spatiotemporal MLP-Mixer adapter with edge/time embeddings, temporal mixing, channel mixing, and low-rank spatial mixing.

title: A Task-Oriented Spatial Graph Structure Learning Method for Traffic Forecasting
notes: Task-oriented spatial graph structure learning adapter with learned adaptive graph, GAT-style aggregation, and LSTM temporal encoding.
